import React from 'react'; import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import '../styles/role-selection.css'; const RoleSelectionPage = () => { const navigate = useNavigate(); const handleRoleSelect = (role) => { // Store role in sessionStorage sessionStorage.setItem('selectedRole', role); // Navigate to login with role param navigate('/login'); }; return (

🌾 CottonCare AI

Intelligent Cotton Disease Detection

Who are you?

Select your role to get started

{/* Farmer Role */}
handleRoleSelect('farmer')} >
👨‍🌾

Farmer

Scan leaves and get instant AI diagnosis

  • 📸 Quick leaf scanning
  • 🤖 Instant AI diagnosis
  • 💊 Treatment recommendations
  • 📊 Scan history & tracking
{/* Expert Role */}
handleRoleSelect('expert')} >
👨‍⚕️

Expert

Verify diagnoses and manage cases

  • ✅ Verify predictions
  • 👥 Manage farmer cases
  • 📈 View analytics
  • 💬 Provide expert feedback
{/* Admin Role */}
handleRoleSelect('admin')} >
👨‍💼

Administrator

Manage system and all users

  • ⚙️ System configuration
  • 👥 User management
  • 📊 Full analytics
  • 🔒 Security settings

Already registered? You can change your role anytime in settings.

); }; export default RoleSelectionPage;
